entry.title: New IDC HSFE7017D0014 awarded to AMERICAN MEDICAL RESPONSE, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF, NATIONAL MEDICAL TRANSPORT AND SUPPORT SERVICES, 5 YEAR CONTRACT WITH ONE 6 MONTH BASE PERIOD, FOUR 12 MONTH OPTION PERIODS AND ONE 6 MONTH OPTION PERIOD

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
